verdict.answer_first: A is slightly better: it reaches the command by line 3, "git rebase -i HEAD~3"; B also starts with a survey, "two common ways," so neither truly leads with the bottom line.
verdict.decisiveness: A wins because it eventually gives a preference, "soft reset is usually the easiest"; B stays in option mode and ends with "which directory".
verdict.fabrication: B invents context: "the current one (`/private/tmp`) isn't a git repo." A: none.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to execute because it shows the exact edit from "pick" to "squash" and explains "fixup"; A is shorter but less explicit.
